audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a clear and steady tone, accompanied by occasional pauses and a slight rise in pitch when emphasizing certain points.
temporal_description: A woman with dark hair tied back, wearing a brown jacket over a light-colored top, stands in a dimly lit room with wooden walls and doors featuring round porthole-style windows. She holds a phone to her ear, then lowers it to look at the screen, occasionally shifting her stance slightly. The room has posters on the wall, one of which features a person holding flags. The scene transitions to a nighttime street view, showing a brightly lit temple with multiple spires in the distance, framed by buildings on either side and illuminated by streetlights.
